restoration_benefit.source_quote: 3.9 Re-load of Sum Insured We will provide a 100% Re-load of Sum Insured once in a Policy Year, provided that: a) the Base Sum Insured and No Claim Bonus (if any) is insufficient as a result of previous claims in that Policy Year;
